prompt: A breathtaking, panoramic view of a fantasy coastal city. The scene is dominated by a large stone castle on a hill overlooking the vibrant blue ocean. Below the castle, a bustling town features European half-timbered houses with brown roofs, nestled among lush green trees and palm trees. A clear turquoise inlet flows through the center of the town, lined with stone quays, sandy beaches, and small wooden boats. In the distance, several large sailing ships navigate the deep blue sea. The sky is clear blue with fluffy white clouds on a bright sunny day. The overall aesthetic is highly detailed digital illustration, classic RPG concept art, with vibrant colors and intricate architectural details.
